title: ultraworkers/claw-code
summary: 这是一个名为claw-code的开源项目，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code/LazyCodex构建，由AI代理自主管理和维护的博物馆展品，无需任何人工干预。项目拥有近20万星标，展示了AI在软件开发中的自主能力。
summary_en: An open-source project named claw-code, built in Rust with Gajae-Code/LazyCodex, featuring an agent-managed museum exhibit developed and maintained entirely without human intervention. With nearly 200k stars, it demonstrates AI's autonomous capabilities in software development.
